what: Re-scored the v1 Phase-2 LLM routing episodes (same model decisions) with DockQ-validated COMPLEX truth (monomers unchanged at CA-lDDT>=0.9) to test whether the headline contrasts depend on the flawed all-chain CA-lDDT.
conclusion: The headline survives the metric correction: interface - raw is ~0 for Sonnet and robustly negative (harmful) for Opus under both the original CA-lDDT and DockQ-corrected complex truth. The CA-lDDT flaw corrected the complex CALIBRATION story (ipTM is well-calibrated; the 0.16 gap was an artifact) but did NOT overturn the routing finding (which concerns reliability-interface packaging and model-dependence).
